channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Study investigates: Did the abrupt end of USAID affect violence levels?
item.description: Researchers examined whether the U.S. shutdown of its primary aid agency had an impact on violence.

item.title: Minnesota becomes first state to ban prediction markets
item.description: Minnesota is the first state to pass a law making it a felony for companies to operate prediction markets.

item.title: Multiple states sue over new student loan limits for nursing and healthcare degrees
item.description: New York, Arizona, North Carolina, Kentucky and Nevada are among the states challenging a rule that restricts federal loans for graduate degrees.

item.title: Trump endorses Ken Paxton over John Cornyn in Texas Senate primary runoff
item.description: President Trump has endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas GOP runoff for U.S. Senate, one week before the election.
